scripts.build: npm run gleam:build && vite build --config config/vite.config.ts && npm run generate:sitemap
scripts.generate:site-config: node scripts/generate-site-config-module.mjs && mise exec gleam@1.15.2 -- gleam format src/site_config.gleam
scripts.gleam:build: npm run generate:site-config && mise exec gleam@1.15.2 -- gleam build --target javascript
scripts.gleam:check: mise exec gleam@1.15.2 -- gleam format --check src
scripts.test: npm run gleam:build && vitest run --config config/vitest.config.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run gleam:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test
